More precisely, an application can be vulnerable when all the following are true:

  *  the application is using Spring MVC or Spring WebFlux
  *  the application is serving static resources from the file system
  *  the application is running on a Windows platform


When all the conditions above are met, the attacker can send malicious requests that are slow to resolve and that can keep HTTP connections in use. This can cause a Denial of Service on the application.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00341, "percentile": 0.25753}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6p4f-wcwh-5vvm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-06T22:30:01Z",
